sql.where:
AND r.payment_status IN (1, 2)
AND r.doctor_id = #{doctorId}
AND d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{doctorName}, '%')
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{subDeptName}, '%')
AND dp.id IS NOT NULL
AND dp.id IS NULL
AND r.date >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND r.date < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON c.id = r.patient_card_id JOIN doctor d ON d.id = r.doctor_id JOIN medical_dept_sub s ON s.id = r.dept_sub_id LEFT JOIN doctor_prescription dp ON dp.registration_id = r.id

SELECT r.id AS registrationId, DATE_FORMAT(r.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, r.slot AS slot, c.name AS patientName, c.sex AS patientSex, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birthday, CURDATE()) AS patientAge, d.name AS doctorName, s.name AS subDeptName, r.payment_status AS paymentStatus, dp.id AS prescriptionId, CASE WHEN dp.id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS hasPrescription FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON c.id = r.patient_card_id JOIN doctor d ON d.id = r.doctor_id JOIN medical_dept_sub s ON s.id = r.dept_sub_id LEFT JOIN doctor_prescription dp ON dp.registration_id = r.id
ORDER BY r.date DESC, r.slot ASC LIMIT #{length} OFFSET #{start}

SELECT r.id AS registrationId, r.patient_card_id AS patientCardId, r.doctor_id AS doctorId, r.dept_sub_id AS subDeptId, DATE_FORMAT(r.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, r.slot AS slot, r.payment_status AS paymentStatus, c.name AS patientName, c.sex AS patientSex, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birthday, CURDATE()) AS patientAge, d.name AS doctorName, s.name AS subDeptName FROM medical_registration r JOIN patient_user_info_card c ON c.id = r.patient_card_id JOIN doctor d ON d.id = r.doctor_id JOIN medical_dept_sub s ON s.id = r.dept_sub_id WHERE r.id = #{registrationId}
